items.claim: Max Holloway has been very active in his recent fighting career.
items.quote: Holloway has been very active fighting in 2026

items.claim: Max Holloway's loss to Charles Ola was primarily due to Ola's takedown game.
items.quote: He lost that by decision mainly because of the takedown game.

items.claim: Max Holloway is not naturally a welterweight fighter.
items.quote: it's not like he's a welterweight fighter.

items.claim: Conor McGregor is not naturally a welterweight fighter.
items.quote: Either is McGregor. McGregor might be a welterweight fighter, but this is just a fight

items.claim: Max Holloway is currently in a good groove.
items.quote: I just think Max Holloway is in a groove right now.

items.claim: Conor McGregor is inactive compared to Max Holloway.
items.quote: So, Holloway is still active. McGregor's not.

items.claim: Conor McGregor will get tired as the fight progresses.
Conor McGregor is in the best shape of his life.
items.quote: Conor McGregor is in the best shape of his life.

items.claim: Cody Deran lands more than one takedown per round.
items.quote: he lands more than one takedown per round

items.claim: Alexandro Costa lands less than one takedown every three rounds.
items.quote: Costa lands less than a takedown every three rounds.

items.claim: Alexandro Costa has an 86% takedown defense rate.
Ryan Gandra has 100% takedown defense in his UFC career.
